INTRODUCTION
Airbnb is a two sided marketplace, bringing together hosts

concepts.finding:
Te search ranking problem at Airbnb is to rank the places to stay,
referred to as listings, in response to a query from the guest which
typically consists of a location, number of guests and checkin/check-
out dates.
concepts.implication: Inform search ranking and retrieval optimization

Position Dropout
